urdu transliteration text: Qasida - Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai -
Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text:
What a pleasure it is
to be in the vicinity of the Holy Five (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Sar Yahan Aakar Jhukane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text: The pleasure of bowing here is extraordinary / something else altogether!

urdu transliteration text: Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text:
What a pleasure it is
to be in the vicinity of the Holy Five (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Yun To Jannat Ki khiza Khud Bhi Tabarrukh Hai Magar
english translation text: Although the food of the paradise is delicious as is

urdu transliteration text: Nazr E Maula (A.s.) Keh Ke Khane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text: Having this food with the name of Maula is some thing else / unique altogether!

urdu transliteration text: Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text:
What a pleasure it is
to be in the vicinity of the Holy Five (AS)

urdu transliteration text:
Ishk E Haider (A.s) Ka Junoon Kehta Raha Behlol Se
The great love of Ali (AS) kept telling Bahlool
Muft Me Jannat Lutane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text: To let Paradise slip out of your hands is something else / unique altogether!

urdu transliteration text: Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text:
What a pleasure it is
to be in the vicinity of the Holy Five (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Baad Takbeer O Risalat Mehfil E  Shabbir (AS) Me
english translation text: After praising Allah (SWT) and the Prophet (SAW) in the Majlis of Imam Hussain (AS)

urdu transliteration text:
Haydari Nara Laga Ne Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
To Chant in Imam Ali’s (AS) Name is something else/unique altogether
Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text:
What a pleasure it is
to be in the vicinity of the Holy Five (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Ishq me Shabbir (AS) ke Taqleed E Hur Karte Hue
english translation text: In the Love of Imam Hussain (AS) and in the footsteps of Hazrat Hur (AS)

urdu transliteration text:
Kashtiyan Apni Chalane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
Owning your own destiny is something else altogether
Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text:
What a pleasure it is
to be in the vicinity of the Holy Five (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Yun To Har Mushkil Me Hi Aate Hai Maula (AS) Hai Yaken…
english translation text: Although its my belief that Mola Ali (AS) comes to my aid when I am in difficulty...

urdu transliteration text: Wakt E Aakhir Unke Aane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text: But if he comes when I am on my dying bed, than that's something else altogether

urdu transliteration text: Panjetan (AS) Ke Astane Ki Alag Hi Baat Hai
english translation text:
What a pleasure it is
to be in the vicinity of the Holy Five (AS)
